name: Simon Späti
description: Exploring Simon's writings on data engineering, data platforms, and the modern data stack.

llmAnalysis.contextPrompt: You are analyzing a blog post by Simon Späti, a data engineer and author of 'Data Engineering Design Patterns'. He writes about data engineering practices, data platforms, tooling, and the evolving data ecosystem. He has practical, hands-on perspectives on building data systems.

spiciness.contextPrompt: Simon is a practitioner who writes about data engineering with a focus on practical patterns and real-world experience. He has opinions on data platform design and tooling choices.
